Name: Dextra Group
Description:
Established since 1983, Dextra is a leading manufacturer and distributor of engineered construction products for the building and civil industries, supported by a team of over 1000 professionals worldwide. Headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand, Dextra is a privately-owned group of companies with affiliates in America, Europe, Middle East, India and Asia.

Dextra supports and serves the construction industry with smart and dependable solutions that help consultants and contractors design and build ever-challenging structures today for tomorrow’s legacy.

Whether in the ground, in concrete or embedded in steel structures, made of steel or innovative composite materials, Dextra products ensure the efficiency, integrity and safety of construction projects worldwide.

Dextra is recognized as a global solution provider in the construction industry with emphasis on customer service, quality and teamwork. For more information about our group and activities, please visit us at www.dextragroup.com

Name: Stallion Infrastructure Services
Description:
Stallion is a Business Services company that strives to be the leader in providing safe, socially responsible, reliable, and innovative solutions to a broad spectrum of customers. While our roots are in the energy sector, we have leveraged our proficiency in expert logistics, integrated solutions, and smart technology to just about every industry in the United States. In addition, we continually evolve our people, processes, and equipment with a focus on reducing our carbon footprint and leaving every worksite that we operate on in a better condition than when we found it. 

We help our growing portfolio of customers create sustained value by understanding their business challenges and providing innovative solutions to solve them, like:  
•	Rapidly deployed, comfortable, hygienic, connected, and flexible accommodation or workplaces for workers in remote locations.
•	Voice, video, and data inter/intra-site connectivity anywhere in the US
•	Safety systems that provide data to help make informed decisions
•	Equipment and expertise to manage the separation of solids from liquids
•	Fresh water management and delivery systems 
•	Disposal of waste from humans and business operations
•	Water and sewage treatment
•	Security & alarm systems that protect employees and assets
•	Portable power and lighting solutions

We are extremely proud of the more than 700 highly trained, professional, customer focused and hardworking people that deliver these solutions to our customers. We use 23 operational/maintenance facilities, over 10,000 suppliers and tens of thousands of expertly maintained pieces of equipment strategically located throughout the United States.

Name: ASSA ABLOY Opening Solutions Americas
Description:
ASSA ABLOY Opening Solutions Americas provides a complete range of door opening products for access solutions in homes, businesses, and institutions. Our offering includes doors, frames, door and window hardware, mechanical and smart locks, access control, and service. Using the latest technologies and tried-and-tested techniques we are constantly developing innovative solutions that improve our customers' lives through greater security, safety, and convenience.  ASSA ABLOY Openings Solutions serves a wide variety of market customers and provides comprehensive support and services to the architectural community.

ASSA ABLOY is the global leader in access solutions. Every day we help people feel safe, secure and experience a more open world. We operate worldwide with 63,000 employees and sales of SEK 150 billion, with leading positions in areas such as efficient door openings, trusted identities and entrance automation. Our innovations enable safe, secure and convenient access to physical and digital places.

Name: Bishop Lifting

Name: Duyar
Description:
We have tried to reach the highest quality, the most reliable and innovative products since 1965! 

We set out as a metal hammering workshop about 50 years ago. While construction and shipbuilding industries were developing, we were also affected positively and expand our business to manufacture top-quality valves and fire products. Today, it appears that we have reached stable and strong export capability with more than 65 countries. In the future, we will continue to grow with our skilled workforce, production power and unlimited ambition. 

Keeping a close eye on the developing casting technologies in the globalizing world market, we diversified our products and increased our product quality regularly. While diversifying our products, we took the needs of our customers into consideration. For us, the quality is a superior to profit just as customer satisfaction is a superior to everything else. 

We are enjoying the pride of being a pioneer in the sector with approximately 300 qualified personnel. Since we know very well those quality and success are closely related to organization structure indeed. We constantly improve our personnel quality through both in-house and outsource training seminars. We are also preferred for our high quality products & services alongside precise delivery times. We provide our customers with the highest level of flow control solutions and logistic support under all circumstances with our elite dealers.

Name: ASSA ABLOY ACCENTRA, formerly Yale Commercial
Description:
ASSA ABLOY ACCENTRA makes access and egress simple for commercial, multi-family, and institutional facilities. We offer a comprehensive range of door opening products, locks, exit devices, and digital access solutions that are trusted to protect the facilities of today and tomorrow.

ACCENTRA is backed by a tenured team of consultative experts with a deep understanding of what matters most in your building—from high-performance durability to unmatched security and access management. Working within a security continuum, we equip you with the services and solutions you need to increase the security, life safety, and convenience of your facility.

*
*
*

On June 20, 2023, ASSA ABLOY announced its acquisition of the Hardware and Home Improvement (HHI) business from Spectrum Brands. As part of the settlement agreement with the U.S. Department of Justice, ASSA ABLOY agreed to divest its premium mechanical and smart residential businesses (Yale Real Living and August), and Yale brand in the U.S. and Canada.

ASSA ABLOY will continue to provide the entire Yale portfolio of commercial products, however, due to the divestment, these products must be re-branded under a new name.

The nearly 200-year legacy of Yale Commercial hardware will now become ASSA ABLOY ACCENTRA. While the name has changed, the outstanding quality of the hardware has not. Backed by ASSA ABLOY, the ACCENTRA commercial product line will continue to meet your door hardware life-safety protection needs.

With this change comes opportunities – an opportunity to learn, grow, and evolve into a better and stronger version than before. We will continue to maintain the trust and reliability you have come to expect from Yale Commercial through this upgrade. Now more than ever, ASSA ABLOY ACCENTRA is committed to being your steadfast partner in the commercial door hardware industry.

Name: Kingspan Insulated Panels CEME (Central Eastern Europe, Nordics, Türkiye, Central Asia, Middle East)
Description:
Kingspan Insulated Panels is the world's largest and leading manufacturer of high-performance insulated panel systems. Offering a range of insulation cores from A-class mineral fibre to Kingspan's flagship QuadCore technology, we have a solution that suits all regulatory regimes while delivering a faster speed of construction with less labour when compared with traditional built-up systems. Kingspan's proprietary QuadCore technology provides building owners with excellent build quality and air tightness, underpinned by a guaranteed lifetime thermal performance.

We have a long-term commitment to delivering a sustainable agenda as part of the Kingspan 10-year sustainability programme. Through Planet Passionate, we aim to impact climate change, circularity and protection of our natural world. We believe that through true collaboration we can help make a difference.

Name: PERA İSKELE VE KALIP SİSTEMLERİ A.Ş.
Description:
Since its establishment in 2015, Pera Scaffolding & Formwork Systems has been driven by one clear vision: to redefine quality and reliability in the construction industry. Born from deep experience and insight into the sector’s evolving needs, Pera has become a trusted partner for contractors, engineers, and developers seeking advanced, safe, and sustainable formwork and scaffolding solutions.

Located in the Eğil Organized Industrial Zone, our modern production facility stands on a 40,000 m² area — including 12,500 m² of manufacturing space, 2,500 m² dedicated to management and R&D, and 25,000 m² of open storage and landscape areas. Designed and constructed by our own contracting group, the factory proudly holds a Green Building Certificate, reflecting our commitment to environmental responsibility and innovation.

With a team of over 100 skilled professionals, Pera contributes not only to the regional economy but also to the advancement of global construction standards. Our approach combines engineering precision, high safety standards, and customer-centered service to deliver durable, high-performance systems for every project.

At Pera, we believe that true strength lies in trust. That’s why every system we design, every partnership we build, and every project we support is guided by our core values — quality, safety, integrity, and sustainability.

Today, Pera continues to grow as a recognized international brand, known for its innovative mindset, ethical business principles, and long-term commitment to excellence. We don’t just build systems; we build the foundations of the future.

Name: DS Stålkonstruktion A/S
Description:
DS Stålkonstruktion er Nordeuropas største stålproducent, som årligt producerer mere end 30.000 tons stål til byggeprojekter i Danmark, Tyskland, Sverige og Norge. DS Stålkonstruktion er en del af DS Gruppen, som har mere end 50 års erfaring og hovedkontor i Hobro. DS Gruppen har en omsætning på ca. 470 mio. euro og beskæftiger mere end 800 medarbejdere.

DS Gruppen og dens uafhængige virksomheder er en del af GOLDBECK, som opfører fremtidsorienterede ejendomme i hele Europa. I samarbejde med den familiedrevne virksomhed anser vi disse bygninger som produkter og vores kunder skal således kun gå ét sted hen for at blive betjent gennem hele processen: fra design og opførelse til serviceydelser under drift. I regnskabsåret 2021/2022 færdiggjorde GOLDBECK knap 500 projekter i hele Europa, hvilket genererede en samlet omsætning på mere end 5 mia. euro. I øjeblikket beskæftiger virksomheden mere end 11.000 medarbejdere på flere end 100 lokationer på tværs af Europa.

Vores kvalitetsstyring er certificeret iht. DS/EN ISO 9001, ligesom vi udelukkende anvender stål fra godkendte leverandører i henhold til DS/EN 10025 og DS/EN 10204.

Name: Armeg Ltd
Description:
Armeg Ltd is a manufacturer and supplier of premium quality power tool accessories and hand tools for professional users. We were founded in Sheffield, England in 1973 and 50 years later still call it home, with our head office and manufacturing facility based in the city. 

The Armeg brand is synonymous with smart design, enduring quality and trusted performance. Our range includes Drill Bits, Holesaws, Power Driven Saw Blades and Nut Drivers, with tools designed to work in a variety of materials. 

We market our products through a network of distributors and are a leading supplier to the UK electrical wholesale industry. Alongside this we have many years’ experience in supplying global markets. Excellent service is essential and we strive to provide strong stock availability, next day deliveries and sell-through support. 

We continually develop products to meet changing customer demand and industry requirements. Over the years, we’ve created products that have revolutionised the way professionals work, such as the electrical box sinker, the world’s first square-hole drill. 

Our on-site design team and factory also means we are proud to provide a bespoke service. We can provide custom made drilling, driving and tool solutions for the construction industry.

For further information visit:
www.armeg.com
Instagram: @armeguk

Name: KÇS Kipaş Çimento
Description:
KÇS Kipaş Çimento, 2006 yılında Kipaş Holding tarafından kurulmuş ve 2008 yılında üretimine başlamıştır. KÇS Kipaş Çimento, 2012 yılında yaptığı yeni hat yatırımı ile birlikte yıllık 3.200.000 ton Klinker ve 4.000.000 ton çimento üretim kapasitesine sahip Çimento Üretim Tesisi’ ne sahiptir. 

Çimento Üretim Fabrikasının yanı sıra toplamda 33.000 m3/gün üretim kapasitesine sahip 7 ilde faaliyet gösteren 14 adet beton üretim tesisi ve 17 adet beton santrali birlikte başta Akdeniz Bölgesi olmak üzere Kahramanmaraş ve çevresindeki illerde güçlü bir aktördür.

Yapı malzemeleri sektöründe yaptığı yatırımlara devam ederek 2013 yılında dönemin son teknolojik olanakları ile kurulan KÇS Kipaş Gazbeton Kahramanmaraş Tesisi 400.000 m3 gazbeton üretim kapasitesine sahiptir. KÇS Kipaş Gazbeton, 2019 yılında Aydın Söke de 600.000 m3 kapasiteli ikinci Gazbeton Üretim Tesisi yatırımını gerçekleştirerek, gazbeton üretim kapasitesini toplam 1.000.000 m3'e çıkarmıştır. Yatırım yaptığı her alanda öncü misyonunu sürdüren Kipaş Holding ve KÇS, Söke Tesisinde Donatılı Gazbeton üretimini de 2019 yılında hayata geçirmiştir.

Sürekli iyileştirme, verimli üretim ve çevreyi koruma yaklaşımı ile KÇS, Atık Isıdan 9 MW/h üretim kapasitesine sahip Enerji Santralini 2017 yılında devreye almış ve yatırımlarına devam ederek atıkların bertaraf edilerek enerji geri kazanımı yaptığı Atık Yakma Tesisini 2018 yılında devreye almıştır.

Sektörünün en iyisi olması prensibi ile çalışarak kısa zamanda Türkiye’nin önde gelen Çimento üreticileri arasına giren KÇS; Kahramanmaraş ilinin, Pazarcık ilçesi Gaziantep-Narlı otoban gişeleri yolu üzerinde 756.000 m2’lik bir alanda Çimento ve Gazbeton üretim faaliyetlerini sürdürmektedir. 7 ilde bulunan tesisleri ile Çimento, Gazbeton ve Beton üretim faaliyetlerini yürütmekte ve yaklaşık 1000 kişiye istihdam sağlamaktadır.

Name: Guruli Window
Description:
Our innovative glass bead system replaces curtains, instantly blocking sunlight and reducing energy and maintenance costs. 

Guruli Window is a pioneering innovation in architectural design — a kinetic sand-based window system that brings together art, movement, and functionality in a way no traditional glazing can. Our patented technology transforms passive glass into a dynamic visual experience that naturally regulates light, enhances energy efficiency, and creates a calming, ever-changing ambiance in any space.

Our product is designed for a wide range of spaces — from luxury hotels and high-end commercial buildings seeking signature design elements, to modern residential homes looking for a blend of functionality, beauty, and energy savings. Guruli Window adds a premium experience to interiors by offering a meditative effect, making it ideal for wellness and relaxation areas where both aesthetics and atmosphere matter.

The product was first unveiled at the Geneva International Exhibition in 2019, followed by participation as a main sponsor at Build Expo Houston 2023, and most recently showcased at VivaTech Paris 2025 — receiving international attention for its originality and potential impact across residential and commercial architecture.

Guruli Window Representation LLC is currently in an active phase of product refinement, partner exploration, and fundraising. We're building bridges between design, sustainability, and innovation — looking for investors, co-producers, and manufacturing collaborators to bring this unique invention to a broader market.

With patents already granted in India, China, and Japan, and applications pending in the U.S. and EU, Guruli Window is protected by a strong IP foundation. Our team brings over a decade of development, including engineering, business strategy, and deep belief in the idea’s long-term value.

We are redefining what a window can be — not just a barrier to the outside, but a living element within the architecture.

Name: MCB Smide & Maskin AB
Description:
I över tjugo år har vi hjälpt företag och privatpersoner i Västra Götaland med tjänster som Svetsning, plåtbearbetning, smidesarbeten, maskinservice, hydraulik,  lastbilspåbyggnader och mycket mer!

Vi utför MMA, TIG, MIG/MAG svetsning. CNC styrd kantpress, gradsax, bandsågar och rörbockningsmaskiner är bara några av alla maskiner vi har för att utföra ditt jobb med bästa möjliga resultat.

Vi utför även tillverkning & montering av bärande stålkonstruktioner enligt EN1090.

Hur går det till?

Vid behov gör vi kundbesök hos både privatperson som företag, lägger upp ett kostnadsförslag och en arbetsplan. Saknas ritningar så ritar vi själva upp i 2D/3D för att underlätta tillverkning och säkerställa att resultat blir som ni önskar.

Efter färdigställd tillverkning erbjuder vi alltid varmförzinkning, pulverlack, och våtlack om så önskas.

När produkten är färdig kan vi både leverera och montera. Vi har två arbetslag som endast är ute och monterar och levererar våra tillverkade produkter.

2017 flyttade vi till en nybyggd verkstad på ca 900kvm som möjliggör stora som små projekt.

	Główny zakład produkcyjny Spółki znajduje się w Śniadowie, a dodatkowo dwa oddziały produkcyjno-handlowe zlokalizowane są w Łomży i Zambrowie. Przedsiębiorstwo zatrudnia około 150 wykwalifikowanych pracowników.

	W oparciu o własny asortyment PREFBET Śniadowo oferuje tani i technologicznie prosty system budowy obiektów z betonu komórkowego, na który składają się:
- elementy murowe ścienne,
- elementy nadproży, ocieplające, osłonowe i wentylacyjne,
- strop gęstożebrowy TERIVA 4,0/1 z elementami SKB.

	Uzupełnieniem do asortymentu wyrobów z betonu komórkowego są:
- elementy silikatowe pełne, drążone i akustyczne,
- bloczki fundamentowe, pustaki szalunkowe, wentylacyjne, ergobloczki i termobloczki,
- belki do stropów gęstożebrowych,
- bloki betonowe MAXIBLOK,
- elementy ścian oporowych L i T,
- płyty ażurowe MEBA, płyty drogowe,
- beton towarowy wszystkich klas.

	Ponadto PREFBET Śniadowo oferuje klientom:
- kompleksową obsługę budownictwa jednorodzinnego,
- kompleksową obsługę inwestycji wiejskich przy realizacji obiektów inwentarskich,
- sprzedaż betonu towarowego z usługą szalowania,
- usługi transportowe wraz z rozładunkiem,
- opracowywanie kosztorysów i przeliczanie projektów.

	Dopełnieniem oferty produkcyjnej jest sprzedaż towarów bezpośrednio stosowanych z wyrobami z betonu komórkowego w procesie murowania, takich jak:
- cement,
- wapno,
- kleje do betonu komórkowego,
- narzędzia do murowania.

	PREFBET Śniadowo wraz z oddziałami zapewnia kompletną obsługę o pozostałe produkty konieczne do zakończenia inwestycji budowlanej, takie jak:
- materiały: ścienne, pokryciowe, termoizolacyjne, hydroizolacyjne,
- stolarka okienna i drzwiowa,
- chemia budowlana.

Name: Gkouzos OE
Description:
Established Excellence in Architectural Aluminum and Iron Constructions

With five years of experience in the industry, Vasileios Gkouzos founded our company in 1989 in the heart of Kalamata, Greece. Initially operating from a modest workshop, the business specialized in architectural aluminum and iron structures, including windows, doors, shutters, and metallic buildings.

In 1998, the company expanded into a larger warehouse to meet growing demand and support a dedicated team of 2–4 employees, which fluctuated over the years based on projects. By 2021, we achieved a major milestone: moving into a newly constructed, company-owned facility of 200 square meters, marking a new chapter of growth and stability.

The family legacy took a significant step forward in 2022, with the establishment of a new company co-founded by Vasileios Gkouzos and his son, Agisilaos Gkouzos, who had already been working alongside his father for seven years. In 2024, the company welcomed two additional equal partners: Filippos Konstantinos Gkouzos and Sevasti Gkouzou, continuing the vision set forth by their father.

That same year, we acquired a second property, embarking on the construction of a state-of-the-art 700-square-meter facility. This new warehouse will feature separate production areas for aluminum and iron, as well as a dedicated showroom to better serve our clients.

Today, our company boasts a strong team of nine skilled employees, including seasoned specialists in aluminum and iron constructions, alongside new recruits eager to learn. Notably, our first employee, who joined us over three decades ago, remains a valued and integral member of our team.

From its humble beginnings to becoming a leader in architectural aluminum and iron constructions, our family-run business continues to evolve while maintaining its commitment to quality, innovation, and the community of Kalamata, Greece.

Name: Dragon Steel Indonesia
Description:
Who are we?
Driven by a strong vision and 50 years of experience in the construction business of our founder, PT. Dragon Steel Indonesia has a mission to become the leading steel structure manufacturer in Indonesia. Our high-tech production facility is situated in Serang, Banten, Indonesia, on a 4ha land, operated by a team of high skilled workers and managed by a strong and professional team with years of experience in the manufacturing, FMCG and energy sector. Dragon Steel Indonesia is run with the highest standard of corporate governance and an uncompromising view on business ethics.


Our Product
We aim to offer customers a diverse range of lightweight H-beams, I-beams and T-beams that are manufactured continuously from hot-rolled steel strips and assembled using high-frequency resistance welding. The beams are thinner than standard hot-rolled beams, therefore the weight is much reduced* but with the same section properties. 

In addition, the size of a hot-rolled steel beam is restricted by its production line as it can only be manufactured in limited size. Our lightweight beams are welded after cutting hot-rolled steel strips to the necessary width, and with the added benefit of being able to cut to length, it is possible to manufacture in various sizes with high dimensional precision to meet the needs of various fields including pre-fabricated housings, structural steel frames, and other advanced structures.

Name: Grady Door & Window Manufacturers
Description:
As a family-owned  manufacturer producing quality joinery since 1979, Grady has established a reputation for delivering right first time solutions to the new build and replacement residential sectors.

With the important changes in fire door safety legislation in the years following the Grenfell disaster, our engineers and designers focused attention on developing products which fully meet these requirements.  These designs were tested to EN 1634-1 for Fire Integrity and Insulation and EN 1634-3 for smoke control at specialist notified fire testing laboratories The result is our Golden Thread range of fire doorsets. All our fire doorset designs are fully accredited and are manufactured through ISO9001 processes at our state-of-the-art facilities.

Grady have combined traditional craft skills with technology to deliver the very best fire door solution on the market at a competitive price. They are fully certified and approved for the manufacture of internally and externally located security front entrance timber fire doors. All timber sourced by Grady meets the requirements of PEFC/FSC and are 3rd party certified by BM-Trada to these standards.

We believe our doorsets offer the best in quality, traceability and most importantly, safety.  We have a first rate logistics operation, ensuring that whether we are providing the installation or acting on a supply-only basis the right doorset is delivered to the right place at the right time.
Grady can evidence primary burn test data for the entire range. This range of fire doors have also been subjected to smoke testing and a range of other testing to ensure compliance with the requirements of Secure By Design.

Name: Aztec International S.A.
Description:
Aztec International S.A. is recognised as a market leader in the field of industrial powder painting in Europe. It is also the exclusive distributor of products manufactured within the Aztec Group, Master Seal Bonded Washers, Master Flash high quality Flashings, Saddle Washers and other sealing and fixing solutions.

The company’s product portfolio also includes anchors, rivets and screws. Our screws programme includes carbon steel zinc plated self-drilling and self-tapping screws, stainless steel screws and bimetal self-drilling screws for various applications. Most of these products we offer with optional powder painting. Once applied to a fastener we can then match the colour of the surface, whether it is façade, roof or ceiling, in a nearly identical colour shade, including levels of gloss and paint structure.

Our own unique and continuously developed technology called Master Coat, as well as by Aztec designed and manufactured high capacity painting lines, allow us to provide the highest quality of powder painting applications on most fastener types and various protective surfaces. Different types of machines allow us to handle even the most challenging tasks, whether it is painting of big volumes of standard fasteners, TORX recess special screws, long composite panel screws or Saddle Washers. Aztec’s production capacity, R&D programme based on our own know-how, together with precise internal quality control, assures a high quality level of our products and services. Our customer service, guaranteed products’ properties, short delivery times and the possibility of personalised products all contribute to Aztec’s high standards.

Aztec International S.A. is a partner of Aztec Washer Co Inc., with headquarters in California, USA. The company was founded in 1968 by Henry DeGraan and has nearly 50 years of trading experience provide strong support to Aztec International’s business

Trải qua 20 năm thương hiệu lan tỏa, sản phẩm Eurowindow đã và đang góp phần KIẾN TẠO diện mạo khang trang cho hàng trăm nghìn công trình trên khắp cả nước, từ các tòa nhà chung cư, biệt thự, văn phòng, trụ sở làm việc các cơ quan nhà nước, tòa nhà các ngân hàng, khách sạn, trường học, bệnh viện... cho đến các công trình trọng điểm cấp quốc gia như: Tòa nhà Quốc hội, Tòa nhà chính phủ, các cảng hàng không quốc tế...

Không ngừng kiến tạo vị thế của mình trong trái tim người tiêu dùng, Eurowindow luôn ĐỒNG HÀNH cùng khách hàng từ khâu tư vấn, thiết kế cho tới thi công, dịch vụ bảo trì, bảo hành sản phẩm. Với đối tác, Eurowindow đồng hành trên tinh thần tương hỗ, cộng hưởng, cùng gia tăng giá trị dài hạn.

Hơn cả sự lựa chọn, Eurowindow mang đến những trải nghiệm hoàn hảo, tạo giá trị khác biệt cho mỗi công trình và góp phần vào sự phát triển phồn vinh của đất nước.

Uşaklıgil is Türkiye’s largest manufacturer of welded mesh security fence systems, twin wire panels, 358 high-security fences, and acoustic noise/sound barriers, operating in a 39,000 m² fully integrated production facility with massive daily capacity — 100 tonnes of fences, 20,000 m² of painting, 45 tonnes of posts, and 1,200 m² of noise barriers.  We specialize in providing customized perimeter security solutions for construction sites, large-scale infrastructure, highways, railways, airports, border security, energy plants, and other critical facilities. By working closely with leading distributors and project contractors, we ensure fast delivery, tailored production, and certified quality for demanding applications worldwide.

 ASTM F2781-15 Certified: Uşaklıgil is the only Turkish manufacturer certified to this highest U.S. security standard, proving our 358 high-security systems can withstand ballistic and heavy forced-entry attacks under medium and aggressive scenarios. Alongside ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 18001-2007, and TSE certifications, we exceed global performance expectations.

 Our exclusive thermoplastic coating technology (superior to standard polyester) ensures long-lasting durability in extreme climates — from Middle Eastern deserts to Scandinavian winters.

 With over 35 years of expertise, family values, and continuous investment in innovation, Uşaklıgil has become a strategic, reliable supplier for governments, global contractors, and international distributors. Jesteśmy polskim producentem i dystrybutorem stolarki okiennej.

Gwarantujemy profesjonalny montaż.
Produkcja naszych okien aluminiowych odbywa się w naszym zakładzie produkcyjnym z użyciem nowoczesnego parku maszynowym z 2020 roku.  
Istniejemy na rynku od 10 lat, a mamy już za sobą rzeszę zadowolonych klientów, których to każdego dnia przybywa coraz więcej. Jest to dla nas ogromna motywacja do dalszej pracy i rozwoju naszej firmy. Każdy kto ma z nami styczność dobrze wie, że doradztwo, terminowość, fachowa pomoc
i profesjonalny serwis są naszymi mocnymi stronami.

W każdej chwili jesteśmy do dyspozycji w zakresie doradztwa i doboru odpowiednich okien, drzwi i bram garażowych, zgodnie z Waszymi potrzebami i gustami. Konsekwentnie stawiamy na najwyższą jakość oferowanych produktów, poszerzając jednocześnie swoją ofertę.

W województwie łódzkim jesteśmy przykładem na to, jak można połączyć wysoką jakość z przystępną ceną. Okna zakupione w naszej firmie to inwestycja na długie lata. Trwałe okna to dla nas sprawa priorytetowa.

Name: RASHMI GROUP ITALIA
Description:
Rashmi Group Italia is a key European subsidiary of Rashmi Metaliks, the second-largest producer of ductile iron pipes worldwide and the leading manufacturer in India, where Rashmi Group is headquartered as an integrated steel and downstream products conglomerate. Established in 2025 with two warehouses strategically located in northern and southern Italy, Rashmi Group Italia positions itself as a primary industrial player with the objective of becoming a European hub of reference.

As a flagship company of the group, Rashmi Group Italia boasts an annual production capacity of 770,000 MT of A+ grade pipes (DN 80–DN 1200) and 26,000 MT of fittings (DN 80–DN 1600) in spheroidal graphite iron (GJS-400).

The group’s production capacities include:

Mini Blast Furnace (MBF): current capacity ~180,000 TPA, with an expansion plan up to 500,000 TPA.

Sinter Plant: capacity ~1,090,000 TPA (planned expansion to 1,440,000 TPA).

Pellet Plant: capacity ~900,000 TPA (expansion to 1,200,000 TPA).

Steel Melting Shop (SMS): capacity ~444,000 TPA, with AOD process for special steels.

Rolling Mill: capacity ~365,000 TPA.

DI Pipe Plant: production of ductile iron pipes for water and sewer applications.

Captive Power Plant: ~120 MW of in-house generation ensuring energy self-sufficiency.

Integrated Steel Facility: ~7.3 MTPA capacity, producing pellets, sinter, pig iron, sponge iron, ductile iron pipes, billets, bars, and wire rods.

Cement Plant: production capacity of approximately 1.9 MTPA.

Name: Terry Fastener-TLH International Trade Co.,Ltd.
Description:
What We Do？
We are a manufacturing factory specializing in bimetal screws, engineered for demanding environments such as coastal areas, photovoltaic systems, and roofing applications.
With 19 years of production experience led by professional engineers, we design, manufacture, and test fastening solutions that deliver strength, corrosion resistance, and long-term reliability.
Our products are widely used in infrastructure, industrial construction, and critical projects where performance and safety matter most.

Why Choose Us？
• Factory-direct manufacturing – no middlemen, full control over quality and delivery
• Bimetal screws designed for special environments, including high humidity, salt spray, and temperature variation
• SGS-certified quality system, with strict inspection from raw materials to finished products
• Rich exhibition experience in global markets, allowing us to understand real project needs
• Trusted by 100+ customers worldwide, with successful cooperation on airports, high-speed rail stations, and other key infrastructure projects
We don't just supply fasteners — we provide manufacturing reliability.

How We Can Help You？
Whether you are a contractor, distributor, or engineering company, we help you:
• Select the right bimetal screw based on real application conditions
• Reduce long-term maintenance risks through stable quality
• Ensure consistent supply from a reliable factory partner
• Support your projects with professional communication and technical understanding
Our goal is to become a long-term partner, not a one-time supplier.

Our Vision：
Our vision is to become a globally trusted bimetal screw manufacturer, known for engineering-driven solutions, consistent quality, and responsible manufacturing.
From a single screw to large-scale projects, we believe strong structures begin with precise details — and reliable partnerships.

Name: ROOSTER Asset Tracking
Description:
Conceived and built from the ground up by tenured construction owners and contractors determined to create better oversight for their inventory, Rooster will answer the questions, What do I own? Where is it? and When is it being used?

The innovative Rooster Asset Tracking System consists of Rooster Hubs and Rooster Activity Trackers. Rooster Hubs are robust data portals that connect to the Cloud using AWS through an LTE-M cellular connection to deliver highly accurate GPS location and activity data. Rooster Activity Trackers are small, rugged devices that, once installed on any piece of equipment, capture activity on a minute-by-minute basis, for up to 5 years, and relay that data to the nearest Rooster Hub. Activity Tracker data transmits through most concrete and metal to any Rooster Hub within and industry-leading ½ mile range using a long-range, low-power pairing design based on the LoRa communications protocol and protected by more than a dozen patents issued and pending.

Proven in the field, Rooster makes finding, monitoring and reporting automatic, delivering real-time visibility into how, where, and when equipment is being used. Easy to order. Simple to setup. All leading to maximized equipment use—and ROI.

With more than two decades in the construction industry, the team at Rooster brings you its state-of-the-art toolset to track equipment and report activity so that humans don’t have to.

Name: SPA-BA S.r.l.
Description:
La Spa-ba srl nasce nel 1955 dalla volontà di due giovani imprenditori esperti nel settore della carpenteria medio leggera. Inizialmente, l’azienda si dedica perlopiù alla realizzazione di capannoni avicoli e successivamente industriali, interpretando e seguendo lo sviluppo economico di quegli anni.
La nuova generazione, forte dell’esperienza diretta acquisita nella conduzione dell’azienda e grazie a una specifica formazione universitaria, raccoglie il testimone ampliando l’offerta di prodotti dell’azienda, che arriva ad offrire anche manufatti di grande prestigio, quali shelter, bunker e camere antiscoppio militari, galleria del vento (Politecnico di Milano), ponti carrabili e passerelle pedonali.
Nella storia più recente dell’azienda, figurano anche la realizzazioni di strutture museali e centri commerciali, ideati ponendo particolare attenzione alle nuove tecnologie rivolte al risparmio energetico.
Oggi, la Spa-Ba srl, attraverso la propria organizzazione e uno staff di tecnici e professionisti di riconosciuto valore, è pronta a raccogliere le sfide che il mercato le proporrà.

Description:

1887 in Heiligenhaus von Richard Beyer und Friedrich Müller gegründet wuchs BMH inhabergeführt über Jahrzehnte zu einem mittelständischen verlässlichen Partner für Industrie und Handel heran und konnte so seine Position bei Industrie und Handel kontinuierlich ausbauen.

Zeitgleich mit dem Wechsel ins neue Jahrtausend übernimmt mit Matthias Kohl bereits die fünfte Familiengeneration die Geschäfte. 14 Jahre später leitet er den Umzug der Firmenzentrale von Heiligenhaus in die benachbarte Schlossstadt Velbert ein. Auf 5.700 m2 Nutzfläche entstand hier ein modernes Verwaltungs- und Produktionsgebäude. Technische Trends wie Gebäudeautomatisierung, Zutrittskontrolle und die Entwicklung von smarten Türschließ-Systemen wurden zukunftsweisend in den Mittelpunkt des Wirkens gestellt. 

Mittlerweile sind die von BMH hergestellten Schlösser nicht nur in Deutschland gefragt, sondern auch im europäischen Ausland. Zu den Kunden zählen große Türenhersteller und der Großhandel. Auch weiß man die Expertise von BMH bei Prestige-Objekten wie der Elbphilharmonie in Hamburg zu schätzen.

Dünya genelinde 2.000’nin üzerindeki takımımızda her rol ve görevin çok özel ve önemli olduğuna inanıyor birbirimize saygı duyuyoruz.

Birbirimiz için gerçekten önemliyiz. Herkesin gücünü takdir ediyoruz. Zayıf olduğumuz alanlarda birbirimize destek oluyoruz. Birbirimizi anlıyoruz. Hedefleri paylaşıyoruz. Güven ve inovasyon, faaliyetimizin temelidir. Güen ve inovasyon günlük işlerde takip ettiğimiz hedefleri belirler, belirli işleri yapmamızı sağlar ve bunları beyan ettiğimizi kanıtlamak ve tanımladığımız hedeflere ulaşmak için kullanılırlar.

We have a strong commitment to quality and are ISO 9001 certificated.

Hillos will relocate to a new state-of-the-art facility, still in Jena, in 2025.

As a Group Company of Hilti, we share the same caring and performance-orientated culture. Our values of integrity, courage, teamwork, and commitment foster an inclusive workplace.

Name: ADS Systems
Description:
In the realm of modern architecture and interior design, aluminum has emerged as a versatile and highly sought-after material for doors, windows, and partitions. Its inherent properties make it an ideal choice for enhancing aesthetics, functionality, and sustainability in residential, commercial, and industrial spaces. Let's explore the benefits, features, and applications of aluminum doors, windows, and partitions in detail.

Benefits of Aluminum:
Durability: Aluminum is renowned for its durability and longevity. It is resistant to corrosion, rust, and weathering, making it suitable for both interior and exterior applications.
Lightweight: Despite its strength, aluminum is lightweight compared to other metals like steel, making it easier to handle and install.
Aesthetic Appeal: Aluminum offers sleek and modern aesthetics, with clean lines and narrow sightlines that complement contemporary architectural styles.
Customization: Aluminum can be easily customized to fit specific design requirements. It is available in a variety of finishes, including powder coating, anodizing, and wood grain finishes.
Energy Efficiency: Aluminum frames can accommodate energy-efficient glazing options, helping to improve thermal performance and reduce energy costs.

Name: Cortellezzi Primo & C. Srl
Description:
Il nucleo iniziale della Cortellezzi Primo, nasce nel 1955 dal suo fondatore Cortellezzi Primo. Nel febbraio del 1956 inizia la vera produzioni di chiavi, cilindri e serrature. All’inizio la produzione è concentrata esclusivamente sul cilindro classico europeo e sul cilindro tondo per portoni; solo in un secondo momento verranno inseriti i cilindretti filettati per armadietti e casellari postali. Questo passo risulterà decisivo per affiancare alla produzione standardizzata una linea di produzioni “speciali” che aprirà nuovi sbocchi nel campo industriale.

All’inizio degli anni ’60, nasce il primo prodotto che porterà una discreta notorietà. In occasione delle olimpiadi di Roma, infatti, viene sviluppato un sistema in grado di bloccare il disco del telefono per non permettere le telefonate internazionali.

Col passare degli anni l’azienda cresce sul mercato italiano ed estero sia nel campo della ferramenta, con il prodotto standard, sia in quello industriale con il prodotto speciale e le altre lavorazioni su misura.

Negli anni '90 viene prodotta una linea molto particolare di catenacci per cancelli che riscuote un notevole successo e porta la società ad essere riconosciuta anche dal grande pubblico.

Nel nuovo millennio, con l’ingresso del nipote Fabio, ci si concentra nello studio di nuove chiusure realizzate in collaborazione con aziende nel settore nautico e nel settore automotive. Questi due settori, infatti, presentano spesso esigenze di sviluppo molto particolari e fortemente sfidanti.

A partire dal 2020 viene inserito il cilindro di sicurezza a chiave piatta e dal 2022 viene inserita la produzione di serrature per porte legno e ferro per poter offrire ai clienti un pacchetto completo di prodotti 

In questi stessi anni sta continuando ancora la prototipazione di nuove soluzioni creative a problemi risolvibili con un congegno di chiusura, facendo del "su misura" un nuovo filone importante dell'attività di costruttori di cilindri per serrature.

The company is also certified by ISO 9001:2015 and actually comply the management system in its daily practice.


In the past decades, basing on our solid foundation in the abrasive wheel industry and knowledge in the greater industry of hardware and tools, we have expanded our production and product lines to the relative fields, including flap discs, fiber discs, and diamond tools, etc.


The head office and the first plant of J Long is located in Dacheng, Hebei Province (2 hours drive from Beijing), while the second plant is located in Zhongshan, Canton Province, and a third plant is in Tianjin. There are over 500 employees work in the company and have reached a daily production capacity of 500,000pcs.

J Long believes SAFETY is the cornerstone for all of our products. Various efforts have been made for different markets and requirements, such as we have a full range products that are certified by MPA (GERMANY safety qualification); and able to comply Different production standards, including EN12413 (European), ANSI (USA) and GB (China) standards.

Throughout Dean's career, home and business owners were constantly plagued with external and internal door hinges and locks in need of repair. Unfortunately, there was no easy and inexpensive method for reinforcing and repairing these issues - until Dean came up with the ZZem Screw concept!

The patented ZZem Screw is a permanent stripped screw hole repair and valuable security kit. In less than five (5) minutes, the ZZem Screw kit can be installed to greatly enhance and reinforce a home or business owners external or internal doors.


In the past, a Do-it-Yourself  or professional turned to a variety of "quick fix" methods ranging from toothpicks, popsicle sticks, wood glue, longer screws etc. in an attempt to resolve a problem door. Although some of these methods provided temporary repair, they did nothing to resolve the issue nor did they reinforce the door for added security. Welcome to the ZZem Screw!

ZZem Screw is a high quality, made in America, Veteran-Owned product designed to repair and reinforce the doors of every home and business owner today!

Name: MysoHemp Technologies Inc.
Description:
Mysohemp introduces the EcoBrick, a groundbreaking innovation in the sustainable construction materials industry. This revolutionary product, crafted from a blend of hemp and mycelium, represents a significant leap towards environmentally friendly building solutions.
Positioned at the forefront of green construction, the EcoBrick not only aims to reduce carbon emissions but also addresses the critical issue of biomass waste management through its sustainable production process.
The EcoBrick distinguishes itself from traditional construction materials and current alternatives with its unique composition, offering unparalleled benefits in terms of fire resistance, thermal and humidity regulation, and acoustic insulation. Designed to meet the demands of the modern construction industry, it caters to construction companies, contractors, and residential developers seeking sustainable, energy-efficient building solutions.
Mysohemp's commitment to quality, regulatory compliance, and market readiness underpins its strategy for large-scale adoption across Canada.
The company's innovative approach, leveraging hemp's durability and mycelium composites' bio-fabrication capabilities, aligns with the increasing worldwide demand for eco-friendly construction alternatives. With a focus on reducing transportation costs and CO2 emissions, Mysohemp supports a circular economy, contributing to the preservation of natural resources and promoting environmental sustainability.

The global potential for the EcoBrick is vast, with significant opportunities for market expansion in the United States, Europe, and emerging economies like China and India, where the demand for green building practices is surging. Mysohemp plans a strategic, phased market entry, emphasizing local sourcing, product innovation, and customer engagement to navigate the challenges of regulatory compliance and market acceptance in these diverse regions.

Name: Garruda Scaffolding
Description:
Founded in 1982 by Mr. Ramachandra Devadiga under the name Divya Fabricators, Garruda Scaffolding has a distinguished legacy in the scaffolding manufacturing industry. Originally established in Bengaluru, Karnataka, the company quickly gained recognition for its high-quality scaffolding solutions. As the construction industry evolved, so did our offerings, leading to the formation of two distinct branches—Garruda Scaffolding in Bengaluru and Power Scaffolding in Mangaluru.

At Garruda Scaffolding, we are committed to manufacturing top-quality scaffolding, centering, and shuttering products that meet the highest industry standards. Our extensive product line includes Adjustable Props (Jacks), Centering Sheets, Adjustable Spans, Cuplock Scaffolding, H Frames, Base Jacks, Planks, Couplers, Wall Form Sheets, and a wide array of scaffolding, centering, and shuttering accessories. Each product is designed and engineered to ensure durability, safety, and efficiency on construction sites.

Our Adjustable Props (Jacks) offer robust support for various structural applications, while our Centering Sheets and Adjustable Spans are essential for effective formwork during concrete setting. The Cuplock Scaffolding system, known for its ease of assembly and strong support, is a favorite among professionals for its versatility and reliability. Our H Frames and Base Jacks provide stable and secure foundations, and our Planks and Couplers are critical for constructing safe and effective scaffolding structures. Additionally, our Wall Form Sheets contribute to achieving precise and smooth concrete walls.

Choose Garruda Scaffolding for trusted, high-quality products and experience the difference that decades of expertise can make.

Name: Tree
Description:
Naturally Tree-Cycled
Tree by tree, brush after brush, paint roller after paint roller, we aim to build a more sustainable world. Tree has dedicated itself with passion for the creation of a greener and eco-friendly future. All while staying faithful to its roots and its dedication to sustainability, TREE has developed a line of equipment with materials that respect the delicate balance of nature. This solution not only meets your needs but actively contributes to the safeguard of our planet.

For Tree, sustainability is not just a simple goal, it’s the core of how we work and envision the future. Every choice and project must leave a positive mark on the planet.

Here is how Tree turns this vision into reality:

• RECICLED AND RESPONSIBLE MATERIALS:
it uses raw materials that originates from recycled sources in order to reduce waste and limit the use of raw resorces.

• LOW-IMPACT PRODUCTION PROCESSES:
the production methods are designed to minimize emissions, energy consumption and waste, to guarantee the highest efficiency with the least environmental impact.

• THE COMMITMENT TO REFORESTATION:
a part of the profits supports reforestation projects, contributing to planting trees and restoring vital ecosystem.

Choosing tree means choosing a philosophy: with your determination and tree’s commitment we can make a difference, one step at a time.

Name: Lynx Systems Pty Ltd
Description:
Lynx Systems is a deep-tech innovation company headquartered in Sydney, Australia.  
 
Co-founded by CEO Marianna Geddes and CTO/Lead Designer Gordon Geddes, the team is developing new ways of delivering and storing energy and developing building infrastructure to deliver on the needs of today's and the future's technology requirements. 
 
Key projects include the Unifying Form Factor (UFF) for Edge Infrastructure - the platform and node for the future Edge Information System.  
 
Lynx's global innovation team has developed the 'Lynx Double Steel Skin Facade', a non-combustible alternative to Aluminium Composite Panel (ACP) cladding systems. As a cornerstone system, the design integrates multi-veneers, including solar PV and communication & IoT technology.  
 
The complete Unifying Form Factor is a digital-physical system. Lynx are on track to complete the physical modular triple cavity frame and lightweight BIPV roofing system by the end of 2025. The system is designed to integrate with and support a new Edge computing architecture. 
 
To learn more about the projects we are working on, visit www.lynxsystems.com.au or contact marianna@lynxsystems.com.au.

Name: C.E. Lindgren
Description:
C.E. Lindgren is a family business with long traditions. The company was founded in Helsinki, Finland, in 1881. For the last 50 years, our headquarters has been in the historic town of Porvoo - 50 km east of Helsinki, on the coast of the Gulf of Finland. 
Our product line offers a unique mix of tradition and innovation. Since the beginning, we have designed and manufactured brushes to meet the most demanding requirements of both households and industry. The core competence of our company is still in the development, production, and marketing of brushes tailored to match customer needs. Today, C.E. Lindgren has three lines of business: 

Painting tools
Approximately 60% of our turnover comes from painting brushes and other tools for interior decorating. We are one of the leading suppliers of painting tools in Finland. This has been achieved by providing our customers with excellent service and a wide range of high-quality products. Our co-operation with Scandinavia's largest manufacturer of painting tools, the Swedish Anza, has also assisted in our continual growth.

Industrial brushes
We design and manufacture bespoke brushes and brush-based solutions for a wide variety of industrial customers in Finland. Our experience, expertise, dedication to meeting customers' expectations, and aim of keeping delivery turnaround times as short as possible are keys to our success.

Plastic matting
The high quality of our products and services has made our EVERSLIDE brand the market leader in the world. Since 1984, more than 300 ski jumps have been equipped with EVERSLIDE plastic matting. The product range also includes matting for our Sledding Slopes. For further information, please visit www.everslide.com

Name: Grupo DOMAFER
Description:
O Grupo Domafer nasce para transformar a forma como engenheiros, arquitetos e construtores conduzem suas obras, unindo tecnologia, precisão operacional e um atendimento verdadeiramente consultivo. 
Mais do que fornecer materiais, atuamos como parceiros estratégicos em cada etapa do projeto, do planejamento técnico à entrega no canteiro, garantindo fluidez, segurança e previsibilidade para quem constrói com responsabilidade.
Nosso compromisso começa na seleção criteriosa da matéria-prima, passa por processos internos otimizados e rigorosamente controlados, e se consolida na entrega pontual, organizada e alinhada ao cronograma da obra. Cada detalhe é pensado para reduzir retrabalhos, evitar desperdícios e oferecer soluções que performam na prática, não apenas no papel.
Com linhas completas de Aço Armado, Lajes e Vigas Metálicas, o Grupo Domafer atende projetos residenciais, comerciais e industriais com alto padrão técnico. Da validação estrutural à montagem, asseguramos resistência, durabilidade e conformidade com normas, proporcionando tranquilidade para quem assina e executa.
Nosso diferencial está no método. Desde o primeiro contato, o atendimento é conduzido por profissionais preparados para entender o projeto, orientar escolhas e antecipar desafios. Esse olhar consultivo transforma o pedido em uma solução personalizada, garantindo agilidade sem abrir mão da precisão.
Construímos com propósito, entregamos com excelência e seguimos evoluindo para ser referência em soluções completas para a construção civil. Se você busca um fornecedor que entende a complexidade da obra e atua como extensão do seu time, o Grupo Domafer está pronto para caminhar ao seu lado, do primeiro traço até a entrega final na cidade de Indaiatuba e toda região metropolitana de Campinas.

Description:
We're not just saving the world from waste - we're using it to build robust roofs. Our innovative composite roofing tiles are entirely crafted through an eco-friendly process of plastic recycling. Each Tetrix Roof contributes positively to the environment, keeping plastics from returning and polluting our planet.

Our commitment to sustainable living is matched by our dedication to quality. Our manufacturing process is backed by rigorous laboratory testing and stringent quality checks. Using advanced technology, every Tetrix Roofs flat composite tile meets and exceeds industry standards.

Every single Tetrix Roof tile is designed for long-term use. Built from a sand-polymer composite, our tiles are durable, stable, and designed for an unlimited lifespan and diverse applications. They withstand harsh weather, and their longevity means less replacement and less waste.

With Tetrix Roofs, you're making a choice that positively impacts our planet's future. You're choosing sustainability without compromising on durability and quality. You're saying 'yes' to an innovation that combines practicality and environmental responsibility. In a world where change is constant, let's make a change that counts. Choose Tetrix Roofs.

Name: STRUCTECO
Description:
STRUCTECO is Redefining Modern Methods of Construction with its eco-sustainable building panels.
Our building panels are used to build housing, villas, airports, hotels, resorts, social housing, apartments all over the world.
Simple construction using polystyrene and fine concrete for easy and efficient ultra-low carbon construction. Our sustainable system creates less CO2 in construction (33kgCO2e/m2) and saves more than 65% of the user's energy needs compared to traditional homes.
Our advanced construction solution has undergone internationally recognised laboratory tests that prove the structural strength of its monolithic joints, meaning it can withstand earthquakes and cyclones
They meet international fire resistance standards, providing an REI rating of 90 minutes for load bearing wall and 120 minutes for not load bearing wall.
Our innovative construction solution reduces construction times by as much as 50%
A rough structure made with Structeco building panels can cost up to 40% less than a traditional structure of similar market value, leading to significant savings in labour costs and a carbon benefit.
Our building panels are produced with the Italian technology of EMMEDUE.

Name: Starwan
Description:
Starwan is a startup dedicated to transforming discarded car tires into eco-friendly, premium roofing materials.

We aim to create a win-win impact; 
- Reducing environmental waste of car tires.
- Providing eco-friendly, premium roofing 
solutions.

At Starwan, we revolutionize the construction industry by turning a global environmental problem—discarded vehicle tires—into a sustainable solution: eco-friendly, premium, longer-lasting (50+ years) roofing materials.

According to the World Business Council for Sustainable Development, globally, over 1.5 billion car tires are discarded annually.
And there are currently over 4 billion such tires in landfills, stockpiled, and dumpsites worldwide.
In Ghana alone, over 2 million waste car tires are generated every year.

This is a serious challenge that causes environmental and health risks.

Meanwhile, there is a global shift in demand towards eco-friendly/green building solutions. 

Our innovation lies in converting these tires into eco-friendly roofing materials that not only outperform all traditional roofing options but also significantly reduce carbon footprints and landfill waste.

Environmental Impact: Drastically reducing tire pollution and supporting circular economy principles.

Social Impact: Delivering sustainable roofing alternatives to underserved and climate-vulnerable communities.

Economic Value: Unlocking job creation, scalable production, and long-term affordability.

We’ve developed a 3D prototype design and are preparing to launch a physical MVP that will challenge the norm in roofing—more durable, fire-resistant, longer-lasting (50+ years), and sustainable than conventional materials.

Join us in this journey not just as a funder/an investor, but as a partner in helping us achieve a cleaner, greener, and a more sustainable future for all.

Starwan: Transforming waste into worth.

Name: Indústrias Coimbra de Ferragens
Description:
Como líderes no mercado de ferragens, a Coimbra continua a definir os padrões de qualidade e inovação.

Nossas molas aéreas e acessórios para portas são amplamente valorizados pela indústria.

Uma História de Resiliência: Fundada em 1915 por José Coimbra dos Santos Jr., iniciamos como um negócio dedicado à importação e revenda de ferragens. Nossa trajetória enfrentou desafios durante duas Guerras Mundiais e as flutuações econômicas nacionais e internacionais.

A Evolução para a Indústria Nacional: Com o desenrolar da 2ª Guerra Mundial, as restrições ao comércio internacional afetaram nossa operação, levando o governo brasileiro a incentivar a criação de indústrias locais. Em 1944, respondendo a esse chamado, transformamos a Coimbra em Indústrias Coimbra de Ferragens LTDA e começamos a fabricar fechaduras e outras ferragens de alta qualidade que rapidamente ganharam aceitação no mercado.

Liderança no Mercado de Ferragens: Na década de 80, consolidamos nossa posição de destaque no mercado brasileiro de ferragens. Nos tornamos uma referência em molas para portas e expandimos nossa atuação para atender às indústrias de diversos segmentos. Atualmente, nossa especialização se concentra em molas aéreas, dobradiças e acessórios para portas.

A Coimbra continua a ser movida pela dedicação à qualidade, inovação e compromisso com a satisfação de nossos clientes. Agradecemos por fazer parte de nossa jornada centenária e esperamos continuar a servir como sua escolha confiável em ferragens e acessórios para portas.

Name: Kitchen Concepts Ltd
Description:
Located in Christchurch, Kitchen Concepts designs, manufactures and installs Kitchens and other household joinery for all of Canterbury.
Building new or renovating your existing property. Kitchen Concepts are the people to trust to do the job right.

"Kitchens are not an impulse buy,” owner Glen Kelman explains, “So we try to make the planning, design and installation experience as pleasant as we can. That’s why we have a kitchen showroom here in Christchurch, and we’re happy to visit any home owner to talk about their kitchen flow, look, and storage.”

With a team of in-house kitchen designers, their own factory manufacturing your custom kitchen, and years of experience managing kitchen projects big and small, Glen and the team at Kitchen Concepts looks forward to helping you create your perfect kitchen.

Woodwork was the only subject that Glen enjoyed at school, so it’s little wonder that his first job was working with kitchen joinery – and he hasn’t looked back.

“There’s nothing better than helping create a kitchen that both works well and looks great,” says the Kitchen Concepts owner. “I didn’t set out to run my own company, and I certainly didn’t see myself as a salesman. Customers just kept turning up and we’d help them out. It’s all grown from that.”

In the early days, Glen’s specialty was installing kitchens. Working as Install Concepts, he fitted hundreds of kitchens for Christchurch homes. Then in July 2019, to better communicate the full-service kitchen company they had become, the Kitchen Concepts brand was unveiled: same company, same team, same level of attention for every project – just a different name.

It’s not unheard of for the Kitchen Concepts team to receive a batch of fresh baking from delighted customers, testing out their new or renovated kitchen.

Ready for a new kitchen, kitchen renovation or kitchen facelift? 
Contact your Christchurch kitchen specialists!

Name: wienerberger Polska
Description:
wienerberger w Polsce jest częścią międzynarodowego koncernu wienerberger AG, największego na świecie producenta cegieł ceramicznych, europejskiego lidera w produkcji ceramicznych dachówek a także dostawcy nawierzchni betonowych w Europie Środkowo-Wschodniej i systemów rurowych w Europie. Firma została założona w 1819 roku w Wiedniu, gdzie do dzisiaj mieści się jej siedziba i jest notowana na giełdzie.

W Polsce działa od 1995 roku, kiedy to wprowadziła na rynek pustaki poryzowane pod marką Porotherm i specjalizuje się w produkcji i dystrybucji pustaków, dachówek oraz cegieł elewacyjnych z ceramiki, sukcesywnie rozwijając swoje portfolio o innowacyjne i kompleksowe rozwiązania dla budownictwa. wienerberger stale dąży do osiągnięcia neutralności klimatycznej, realizując ambitne cele ESG. Kompleksowe rozwiązania z oferty wienerberger pozwalają wznosić nowoczesne energooszczędne i zdrowe, budynki w duchu zrównoważonego budownictwa.

Siedziba firmy wienerberger znajduje się w Warszawie, w zrewitalizowanej części Pragi. W Polsce posiadamy zakłady w 13 lokalizacjach, w których wytwarzamy najwyższej jakości rozwiązania ścienne i dachowe: w 7 lokalizacjach produkujemy ceramiczne pustaki ścienne i akcesoria marki Porotherm, w Kunicach k. Legnicy posiadamy 3 zakłady produkujące dachówki oraz akcesoria ceramiczne pod marką Koramic. Cegły i płytki ceramiczne Terca, podobnie jak wiele niestandardowych produktów z pozostałych marek, oferujemy z bogatego portfolio produktów importowanych.

The Terminator Sill Gripper Clip holds all profiles of vinyl siding and eliminates the need for Utility Trim.  Just snap the Terminator Clip into any J Channel to hold cut siding panels in place.  No more call backs for falling siding, no more utility trim ordering, colors, waste, or returns.

Najważniejszą cechą produktów FOAMGLAS jest to, że pozostają one obojętne na najczęstsze problemy dotykające materiały izolacyjne: wodę, parę wodną i ogień. Spienione szkło komórkowe wytrzymuje także ekstremalnie wysokie obciążenia, dzięki czemu nadaje się do izolacji szczególnie intensywnie eksploatowanych stref. Najwyższej klasy obsługa techniczna, od wstępnej fazy projektu i opracowania detali architektonicznych, aż po wsparcie na etapie montażu, gwarantuje zaś Tobie pełny spokój.
Izolacje ze spienionego szkła komórkowego FOAMGLAS są całkowicie pozbawione szkodliwych dla środowiska środków zmniejszających palność materiału, gazów pędnych czy czynników rakotwórczych. Obecnie blisko 60% surowców wykorzystywanych do produkcji izolacji FOAMGLAS pochodzi z recyklingu materiałów, takich jak szyby samochodowe czy odpady produkcyjne pochodzące z naszych fabryk.
Spienione szkło komórkowe FOAMGLAS spełnia wymagania natureplus – jedynej w Europie certyfikacji ekologicznej dla materiałów budowlanych, opartej na kryteriach ściśle naukowych. Produkty FOAMGLAS spełniają najwyższe standardy jakości we wszystkich obszarach kluczowych z punktu widzenia ekologii i zrównoważonego rozwoju.
FOAMGLAS jest marką należącą do Owens Corning, wiodącego w skali globalnej producenta rozwiązań w trzech obszarach: Dachów, Kompozytów oraz Izolacji. Bycie częścią tak dużej, międzynarodowej organizacji pozwala nam skupić się na istotnych płaszczyznach, takich jak zrównoważony rozwój, działalność badawczo-rozwojowa, współpraca z klientami, czy zdrowie i bezpieczeństwo. Wszystko, co robimy w Owens Corning, ma na celu odpowiadanie na potrzeby naszych pracowników, klientów oraz lokalnych społeczności w których żyjemy, a także odkrywanie nowych możliwości w oparciu o naszą wiedzę i doświadczenie.

     Konya ili Akşehir ilçesinde1980’li yıllarda başlayan bir serüven !
1983 yılında ısıtma sistemleri ile üretim hayatına başlayan kuruluşumuz 1990’lı yıllarda çatı su tahliye sistemleri üretim ve uygulamasına başlamıştır. Description:
Founded in 2025, DiPanel set out with a bold vision: to become the world’s leading provider of modular fit-out solutions for the Institutional sector. From day one, we’ve challenged the status quo of space design and construction by developing prefabricated, turnkey panels that integrate critical infrastructure—electrical, data, audio, environmental controls—into a single, high-performance system.

Our product line addresses the five pillars every modern institution demands:

Accessibility: Panels are engineered for universal design, with device placement and cable management that meet—and exceed—accessibility standards.

Safety & Compliance: Every DiPanel solution is manufactured under strict quality controls and tested to regional electrical, fire-safety, and seismic codes. You get documentation-ready assemblies, complete with BIM files, single-line diagrams, and inspection checklists.

Efficiency: By shifting fabrication off-site, DiPanel slashes on-site labor by up to 50%, accelerates project schedules, and reduces waste. Our proprietary estimating tool guarantees fast, transparent quotes and seamless coordination with general contractors and trades.

Innovation: We partner with leading material specialists, from custom aluminum extruders to premium laminate providers, to deliver panels that look as good as they perform, resistant to scratches, moisture, and daily wear.

Flexibility: Our modular designs fit any footprint—classrooms, laboratories, auditoriums, healthcare wings—and can be reconfigured or expanded as needs evolve. Future-ready options, like IoT sensors and networked audio, allow you to upgrade without rebuilding.

At DiPanel, we believe great spaces start with intelligent infrastructure. By uniting design, engineering, and manufacturing into one streamlined workflow, we empower schools, hospitals, government buildings, and corporate campuses to open on time, stay on budget, and operate with rock-solid reliability.

Name: Milan İskele ve Kalıp Sistemleri
Description:
İnşaat süreçlerinde, yapıların inşa edilmesi, onarımı veya bakımı sırasında çeşitli iskele ve kalıp sistemleri kullanılmaktadır. Milan İskele ve Kalıp Sistemleri’ olarak ürettiğimiz başlıca ürünlerimiz :

Masa Tipi Kalıp İskelesi: Betonarme yapıların inşa edilmesi sırasında, kolon ve perde kalıplarını desteklemek ve beton dökümünü sağlamak için kullanılan bir sistemdir. Masa tipi iskeleler, yüksekliği ayarlanabilir platformları ile inşaat çalışmalarını kolaylaştırır. Güvenlikli Dış Cephe İskelesi: Dış cephe boyama, bakım ve onarım işlemleri için kullanılan iskele türüdür. İnşaat çalışanlarının güvenli bir şekilde çalışmasını sağlayan güvenlik özellikleri ile donatılmıştır. Kule Tipi Kalıp İskelesi: Yüksek binaların veya diğer yapılardaki betonarme çalışmalarında kullanılan dikey destek sistemidir. Kule tipi iskeleler, yüksekliği ve taşıma kapasitesi ile büyük inşaat projelerinde etkin bir şekilde kullanılır. Kovanlı İskele Sistemleri: Genellikle köprülerde, viyadüklerde ve benzeri yapıların inşaatında kullanılan özel bir iskele çeşididir. Yapının dışına kovan benzeri bir yapı oluşturarak çalışanları ve yapının iç kısmını korur. Cuplock İskele: Kilitli boru ve kollar kullanarak montajı kolay ve hızlı olan bir iskele türüdür. İnşaat projelerinde çok amaçlı olarak kullanılır ve farklı yükseklik ve uzunluklarda uygulanabilir. Demirci İskelesi: Demir doğramacılık işlemlerinde kullanılan ve demircilere kolay ve ergonomik çalışma alanı sağlayan bir tür iskele sistemidir. Mobil İskeleler: Taşınabilir yapıya sahip olan iskelelerdir. Çok farklı inşaat ve bakım işlerinde kullanılabilecek taşınabilir ve pratik çözümler sunarlar. Milan İskele ve Kalıp Sistemleri, bu çeşitli iskele ve kalıp sistemleri ile inşaat endüstrisine katkıda bulunarak, daha güvenli, verimli ve etkili inşaat çalışmalarının gerçekleştirilmesine yardımcı olmaktadır.

Description:
2001 yılında gittikçe büyüyen firmamız ; Ege Toros Boru Profil Sanayi ve Ticaret Limited Şirketi olarak kurumsal bir yapıya kavuşarak 2005 yılında İzmir Kemalpaşa ilçesinde 3000 m2 açık 1500 m2 kapalı alan 2010 yılında İzmir Menderes ilçesinde 10.000 m2 açık 5000 m2 kapalı alan kurarak faaliyetlerine devam etmiştir. Genç ve dinamik yapısı ile başarılı yolculuğuna devam ederken, dönemin ve sektörün ihtiyaçlarını çok iyi gözlemleyip, yatırımlarını bu çerçevede sürdürmeye devam eden firmamız gelen talepler doğrultusunda 2019 yılında yapı grubuna girerek SCC Toros Çelik Yapı A.Ş. kurulmuştur.

Her zaman istihdam sağlamak amacı ile ekonomiye değer katmayı vizyon edinen firmamız; İzmir Torbalı'da 2019 yılında başladığı 1.5 yılda sadece kendi öz kaynaklarını kullanarak inşası biten 35.000 m2 si açık 20.000 m2 si kapalı olarak 25 yılı aşkın süredir devam ettirdiğimiz ticari yaşamımıza, Sandviç Panel , Trapez Hattı, Abkant, Giyotin ve Endüstriyel üretim yatırımını da ekleyerek, sanayici kimliğimiz ile birlikte yolumuza emin adımlar ile devam etmektedir.

Satış kalemlerimizi oluşturan, Boru, Profil ,Lama, Silme, Hadde ,Sac tüm metal mamullerini Yapı grubunda Osb, Camyünü, Taşyünü, Board, Boardex, Alçıpan çeşitleri ve kendi markamız ile üretimini gerçekleştirmeye başladığımız Ege Panel ve tamamlayıcı ürünlerimizi, sektörün hizmetine sunarken, 2021 yılının şubat ayında ilk ihracatımızı da Almanya’ya yapmanın gururunu yaşadık. Demir çelik ve yapı sektörü firmalarının ihtiyaçları doğrultusundaki, birinci sınıf ve geniş ürün yelpazesini de stoklarımızda bulundurarak müşterilerimize en iyi hizmeti vermek en birincil prensibimiz olmuştur.

2021 yılında Ege Toros Şirketler Grubu olarak faaliyetlerine sektörün ve bölgesinin gereksinimlerini sürekli düşünen firmamız ; yeni bir yön yeni bir yapılanma ve yeni bir yüz olarak değişikliğe gitmiş tüm depolarını ve logomuzu aynı kurumsal renk yaparak gücüne değer katmıştır.

Name: Owens Corning PAROC Poland
Description:
Pracując z nami, czynisz świat lepszym miejscem do życia.
Znakiem rozpoznawczym marki PAROC są energooszczędne i bezpieczne ogniowo rozwiązania izolacyjne z wełny kamiennej, które z jednej strony wychodzą naprzeciw rosnącym wymaganiom nowoczesnego budownictwa, z drugiej – pomagają tworzyć bardziej zrównoważone środowisko.
Produkty PAROC, dostarczane w opakowaniach w charakterystyczne, czerwono-białe pasy, obejmują izolacje budowlane, izolacje techniczne, izolacje morskie, a także elementy do izolacji akustycznej. Opracowujemy ponadto zaawansowane rozwiązania izolacyjne, począwszy od termomodernizacji starszych obiektów aż po domy pasywne, które pozwalają zminimalizować zużycie energii i emisje z budynków, jednocześnie zwiększając bezpieczeństwo i komfort przebywających w nich osób.
Nasi ludzie łączą doświadczenie oraz innowacyjne spojrzenie z pełną odpowiedzialnością i zaangażowaniem w sukces klienta. Zachęcamy naszych pracowników do tego, by byli głodni nowej wiedzy, aby móc tworzyć rozwiązania wytrzymujące próbę czasu. By kierowała nimi ambicja, lecz także realistyczne cele i priorytety. By byli odpowiedzialni za swoją pracę i dążyli w swoich działaniach do doskonałości operacyjnej. Jesteśmy częścią Owens Corning, globalnej firmy skupiającej w swoich szeregach profesjonalistów, dla których wzajemny szacunek i praca zespołowa stanowią drogę ku realizacji wspólnych celów i utrzymaniu przewagi konkurencyjnej w dzisiejszym, dynamicznie zmieniającym się świecie.
Ciesząc się bogatą, liczącą ponad 80 lat historią, nieustannie wybiegamy myślami w przyszłość – jak przystało na prawdziwego lidera rynku.
Chciałbyś postawić nowy krok w swojej karierze zawodowej? Poznajmy się bliżej – zajrzyj do naszej zakładki Kariera: https://www.paroc.pl/o-paroc/kariera .

Przedsiębiorca uzyskał pomoc w ramach programu rządowego pod nazwą: „Pomoc dla sektorów energochłonnych związana z nagłymi wzrostami cen gazu ziemnego i energii elektrycznej w 2023 r."

Name: Jordahl USA Inc.
Description:
JORDAHL is the original North American manufacturer of DECON Studrails and has recently become a subsidiary of JORDAHL GmbH, which for more than 100 years has manufactured high quality connection and reinforcement products for use in the international construction industry.
We supply two market leading brands, DECON punching shear concrete reinforcement products, and JORDAHL anchor channels for structural and architectural concrete connections. Our products are globally recognized for quality and engineering excellence, and are widely specified internationally for use in both public and commercial building projects including high-rise buildings, offices, hospitals, schools, transportation structures, and stadiums.

DECON Studrails are an efficient, economical, and simple solution to enhance punching shear performance and simplify reinforcement design at slab-column connections, foundation slabs, and post-tension anchorage zones.

JORDAHL anchor channels allow bolted adjustable connections to concrete structures without welding or drilling. Simple to use, the system facilitates reliable, accurate, and rapid installation of façade, and structural connections.

The company has experienced significant growth over the past several years due to the acceptance and promotion of our products by well-respected engineering and contracting firms across Canada and the United States. We currently have offices located in Sonoma (CA), Beaufort (SC) and Brampton (ON) to service sales and engineering enquiries regarding our products.

We would be pleased to provide additional information or assist you with a specific project.

Mark 1 helps electrical contractors and prefab shops bend conduit up to 16x faster and with greater accuracy, reducing waste and labor costs on large-scale projects like data centers, hospitals, and commercial buildings.

We’re focused on building tools that make the toughest parts of electrical construction easier, faster, and safer. Our goal is to give electricians better equipment so they can deliver high-quality work with less fatigue, less waste, and more consistency.

We believe in communicating early, building with care, staying authentic, and empowering the people who build the world around us.

• doświetleń pionowych i elewacyjnych,
• ścian zewnętrznych,

• zadaszeń obiektów sportowych i miejskich,

Name: KLEMCO INDIA
Description:
KLEMCO India Private Limited is a prominent manufacturer based in Amritsar, Punjab. KLEMCO India is part of a conglomerate which was established in 1984 and has been supplying modular support systems since 2014, KLEMCO has grown into one of India’s largest manufacturers with a direct presence in USA, we are 100% in-house manufacturers and suppliers of complete solution for pipe and cable support systems, with a broad portfolio of ETA range of anchor fastening and Modular support solutions for MEP (Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing) and Fire fighting services.

Core Capabilities & Offerings:

1. Anchor Fasteners
	•	A wide range of mechanical and chemical anchor fasteners, with manufacturing for specialty items like J‑bolts, L‑bolts, hooks, nuts and washers, designed for securely fastening pipes, ducts, and equipment to concrete or steel structures .
	•	Threaded rods and chemical anchor-specific studs developed in-house ensure compatibility and engineering-grade reliability.

2. Pipe & Cable Support Systems
	•	Variety of pipe hangers, clevis hangers, nut‑clamps, sprinkler hangers, and slotted channels with spring nuts — essential components for supporting MEP/HVAC/R installations.
	•	Cable-tray and cable-ladder accessories, along with anti-vibration systems, to secure electrical conduits and minimize operational noise or vibration.

3. Modular Support Structures - 3D farmes
	•	Modular framing systems based on strut channels that allow easy, adjustable installations of piping, ducts, and cable trays. This modular approach speeds up onsite assembly and makes reconfiguration simpler, aligning with global best practices.
	•	Custom bracketry and rooftop supports for HVAC units, including special-engineered solutions for unique load or building constraints. Global Presence with Local Roots: Headquartered in India, KLEMCO's integration into global supply chain ensures at site on time deliveries while retaining price efficiency and quick lead times.

We hold ourselves up to the highest standards and have an immense amount of knowledge from years of experience. As a manufacturing company, we continue to expand our practices each and every day. We collaborate with various industries to provide them solution after thorough research and trials. We supply to many local and global companies with a variety of innovative ideas to use our technology, created with the greatest degree of precision and care. 

ALAC is made of inorganic materials such as cement, fly ash and/or sand that won’t catch fire easily, won’t produce smoke or toxic gases and because of its high thermal insulation property, it protects from heat and helps to escape from the building. ALAC uses only cement, fly ash and sand that can be re used as filler material after crushing or can be recycled for producing fresh Aerated Concrete or gets converted to soil after dumping it in the ground. ALAC can be used in various applications like sunken filling, for building walls, for insulating walls and roofs effectively, as decorative elements, etc.

Our Team is headed by a Techno-preneur, who has handful of experience in the field of Lightweight Concrete. المعزور  ستيل من أكبر الأسمـاء  في مصـر  في مجـال الصـاج  الملون ,الصـاج المجلفن  
, الصـاج الساخن , الصـاج البارد , الـواح  السـاندوتش بانـل , الكرفـانـات , غـــرف

تأسست الشركة عام 1952 م ، منذ أكثر من 70 عاماً ، وتمتلك الخبره التى تمكنها   
من التفوق بين المنافسين الآخرين في نفس المجال وتتميز الشركة بتعاونها مع الشركات

تعمل المعزور ستيل كوكيل للعديد من مزودي وموردي المواد الخام ،كما تقوم الشركة أيضًا 
بتصنيعها و إعادة تشكيل المواد الخام إلى منتجات متعددة وفقًا لإحتياجات لسوق المصري 
باستخدام أحدث التقنيات في خطوط الإنتاج و مجموعة مصانعها .

كما تتميز الشركة بالدقة والسرعة في التعامل مع طلبات العملاء ، حيث تم اكتساب ذلك 
من خلال سنوات طويلة من الخبرة  في التعامل مع كيانات من القطاعين العام والخاص.
 كما أن سياسة تسعير الشركة لا مثيل لها بين منافسيها وهذا بالتوازى مع الامكانيات
