Name: Zakład Produkcyjny Armatury Przemysłowej "AKWA" Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Powstanie firmy AKWA wiąże się z przemianami polityczno gospodarczymi zapoczątkowanymi w Polsce na przełomie lat 80 i 90 ubiegłego wieku, które w dalszej konsekwencji objęły swym zasięgiem cały blok Europy środkowo-wschodniej.

W 1990 roku w pierwszej stolicy Polski prastarym Gnieźnie, trzech pracowników wodociągu miejskiego oraz młody absolwent wyższej uczelni wykorzystując wiedzę o rynku oraz zmysł konstrukcyjny postanowiło zrealizować swe zamierzenia.

Tak oto 21 grudnia 1990 roku powstał Zakład Produkcyjny Armatury Przemysłowej s.c.

Nowatorskie rozwiązania konstrukcyjne wraz z rosnącymi potrzebami rynku powodują niezwykle dynamiczny rozwój najmłodszego w Europie producenta armatury wodociągowej.

Trzykrotnie zmienia się lokalizacja firmy, systematycznie wzrasta liczba zatrudnionych, powstają nowe nieznane dotychczas produkty. To najkrótszy komentarz do pierwszej dekady funkcjonowania AKWY.

Dwudziesty pierwszy wiek przynosi zmianę formy prawnej ,uzyskanie certyfikatu ISO 9001 oraz sposobu zarządzania firmą. Od grudnia 2000 roku pełna nazwa firmy brzmi: Zakład Produkcyjny Armatury Przemysłowej sp. z o.o.

Podejmowane inwestycje skierowane są w stronę nowych technologii produkcji pozytywnie wpływających na parametry produkowanej armatury.

Ugruntowana pozycja na krajowym rynku wodociągowym oraz jakość produktów wzbudza zainteresowanie ze strony zagranicznych odbiorców. AKWA przekracza granice zdobywając coraz to nowych odbiorców w większości krajów nowej Europy.

Dziś hasło AKWA nierozerwalnie kojarzy się z armaturą wodociągowo kanalizacyjną odpowiedniej jakości, przyjazną i profesjonalną obsługą, z nowoczesną perspektywiczną firmą.

Name: Clema
Description:
Clema builds cooling systems for crews who work in heat and need to keep moving. Extreme heat already costs U.S. employers more than $100B a year in lost productivity, and >2B workers worldwide face rising temperatures on the job. Across warehouses, construction, energy, logistics, agriculture, and defense, heat slows output, drives fatigue and errors, and increases incident rates. In many facilities, productivity can drop 20–50 percent on hot days. Breaks, fans, and ice help, but they still pull people off-task and rarely last a full shift.

We design equipment for continuous performance. Our active-cooling wearables deliver steady cooling even in high humidity, run for 8–12 hours, and integrate with standard gear. Lightweight builds, balanced weight distribution, and sealed systems designed for dust, debris, and movement. No melting packs that fade after 60–90 minutes. No hoses or fans that get in the way. No reliance on trucks or tents that turn cooling into downtime.

Teams adopt Clema to:
• Maintain throughput during heat waves and peak season surges
• Cut heat-related downtime and reduce incident risk
• Support retention in high-turnover, high-heat roles
• Prepare for tightening OSHA and insurer expectations

We test with the people who lift, weld, operate, harvest, and load every day. Their experience shapes fit, weight, airflow, runtime, and durability so cooling feels invisible and performance lasts from first hour to last.

Heat isn’t a seasonal nuisance anymore. It’s a daily operational constraint. Clema gives employers and workers a way to sustain pace, safety, and endurance when temperatures rise.

Name: Helton Tool & Home
Description:
While Helton Tool & Home is based in Arizona, we were born on the Internet, starting on eBay in 1999 and growing rapidly from there. Simply put, we are experts in Internet commerce: rather than looking out on a quiet street in our neighborhood, our storefront looks out on the world. After years of doing business online under the name HeltonTool, we know what our customers want: high quality products at an affordable price with speedy shipping from a company they can trust to treat them right. At Helton Tool & Home, we deliver it all.
As mentioned, we recently added “Home” to our company name. During our many years in online retail, we have found that high quality home goods from suppliers like Corelle Brands—manufacturers of trusted brands like Chicago Cutlery, Pyrex, Corelle, Corningware, Snapware, Visions and many more—are as “at home” on our shelves as the power tools and accessories that have defined our small business and helped it grow so consistently from the start. We want to reflect all our offerings in our new company name. While customers can still find the tool brands they’re looking for—DeWalt, Makita, Metabo HPT, Ryobi, Porter-Cable, Senco, and many more—at the prices they want, we hope our customers will also think of us first for deep discounts on everyday household items like cookware, cutlery, food storage, replacement lids and more.

In addition to products for the everyday consumer, we also carry contractor supplies for our customers who make a living providing service to others. As an authorized distributor for many of the brands we carry, our customers can enjoy the full manufacturer’s warranty on items from Great Neck, Grip-Rite, Senco, Akro-Mils, Husky, Trimaco, Desert Extrusion, and more.

In addition to the great prices we offer on our quality products, we ship them free to addresses in the contiguous United States. We also offer fast, affordable shipping anywhere in the U.S., to any APO, and to many other locations around the world.

Name: Fitico - The Fitting Company
Description:
Fitico is a professionally managed fittings manufacturing company, specializing in furniture fittings, architectural fittings, and precision sheet-metal components. Built on decades of manufacturing experience, Fitico combines engineering discipline, in-house production capability, and modern industrial processes to deliver reliable, performance-driven fitting solutions.

Our product portfolio includes butt hinges, furniture and cabinet fittings, L-brackets, corner fittings, coat hangers, and custom-engineered fittings designed for residential, commercial, and industrial applications. Every fitting is developed with a strong focus on load strength, dimensional accuracy, corrosion resistance, and consistent surface finish, ensuring long-term performance in real-world usage.

Fitico operates a fully integrated in-house manufacturing facility supported by an advanced tool room for press tool and die development. This vertical integration enables faster product development, efficient prototyping, strict quality control, and scalable production. Our sheet-metal manufacturing capabilities cover cutting, punching, forming, bending, and fabrication across stainless steel, mild steel, and allied materials.

In addition to its branded fittings range, Fitico is a trusted OEM and private-label manufacturing partner for national and regional brands. We support partners across the entire manufacturing cycle—from design feasibility and tooling to prototype validation and mass production—with a strong emphasis on confidentiality, consistency, and long-term collaboration.

With 500+ authorized dealers, presence across 22 states, and operations in 180+ cities, Fitico maintains a strong pan-India footprint backed by professional logistics and supply systems.

Driven by a quality-first culture and modern management practices, Fitico represents the convergence of manufacturing legacy and future-ready fittings engineering.

Name: YENİCE BALLISTIC

Yenice has started its operations in 1995 and become one of the industry’s leading facade companies through its growth momentum in the course of time.YENİCE achieves its goals expanding with each passing year thanks to its experience, strong technical staff as well as its manufacturing and assembly quality in European standards. YENICE İnşaat (YENİCE Construction) has obtained FB6 NS Certificate for its own series of YK90 Bulletproof Joinery Series on 10.12.2013 and still continues to expand its goals.

Yenice İnşaat Dekorasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret Limited Şirketi,1995 yılında faaliyetlerine başlamış olup geçen zaman içerisinde gösterdiği büyüme ivmesi ile sektörün önde gelen cephe firmalarından biri haline gelmiştir.
Yenice İnşaat, tecrübesi, güçlü teknik kadrosu ve Avrupa standartlarındaki imalat ve montaj kalitesi ile her geçen yıl büyüyen hedeflerine başarıyla ulaşmaktadır.
Cephe sistemlerinde lider olma ana hedefi çerçevesinde, yatırımlarına devam ettirmiş ve bunun için gerekli her türlü yan malzeme imalatını kendi bünyesinde kurarak dışa bağımlılığını büyük ölçüde ortadan kaldırmıştır.
Ayrıca makine parkını sürekli yenilemekte 2.000 m2 kapalı alanda alüminyum, çelik, paslanmaz çelik ve kompozit panel üretimi yapılmaktadır. Teknik kadro dahil olmak üzere imalattan montaja tüm çalışanlarının
eğitimine büyük önem vermektedir.

Yenice inşaat 10.12.2013 tarihi itibari ile kendi serisi olan YK90 Kurşun Geçirmez Doğrama serisine FB6 NS Sertifikası’nı alarak hedeflerini büyütmeye devam etmektedir.

Name: Degafloor Ltd
Description:
Degafloor has a long and established history in MMA resin dating back over 30 years. It is widely acknowledged that founder Robert Brown was one of the first pioneers to sell resin to the UK market and was one of the first MMA resin installers for commercial properties.

Our ongoing research into MMA resin has led to continuous product evolution, resulting in innovations such as our Line and Area Marking Solutions, and the hugely popular Degafill Pothole Solution. Each fast-curing resin flooring system is designed and developed with our customers' specific requirements and circumstances in mind. These customers include major retail companies across the UK. 

The research and development invested in our MMA resin make Degafloor the fastest-curing resin on the UK market. This leading technology has made us the number one choice for installers working to tight deadlines and businesses demanding durable flooring solutions. In today’s 24/7 world, all businesses—whether a large commercial restaurant refurbishing a kitchen or a city bank updating its reception floor—require minimal disruption.
Degafloor’s MMA resin is rapidly installed and fully cured within 2 hours at temperatures as low as -30 degrees. All fully cured Degafloor resin flooring is inert and does not create a hazard to the environment in use or during end-of-life disposal making our flooring very popular in industrial and commercial premises. 

At Degafloor we have a UK-wide network of Approved Installers specialising in kitchen and retail flooring. All installers are trained and experienced in Degafloor MMA resin. We’re also a leading contributor to The Resin Flooring Association (FeRFA) and have our products featured in the NBS Source (including the Flake decorative resin flooring solution).

Name: Lindab Polska
Description:
Lindab Polska jest częścią międzynarodowej Grupy Lindab, wiodącego producenta i dystrybutora produktów i rozwiązań dla budownictwa, wentylacji i klimatyzacji. Na światowym rynku jesteśmy obecni już prawie 70 lat. 

W Polsce działamy od 1992 roku, obecnie w 3 lokalizacjach. Zatrudniamy ponad 300 Pracowników. 

Oferujemy sprawdzone produkty, wykonane z surowców najwyższej jakości. Produkty Lindab wyróżniają się stylowym designem, łatwością montażu i zastosowaniem zaawansowanych technologii. 

Stawiamy na bezpieczeństwo, co potwierdzają dokumenty wydane przez niezależne ośrodki badawcze. Nasze wyroby posiadają Krajowe Oceny Techniczne, wymagane certyfikaty, aprobaty techniczne i szczegółową dokumentację, którą na prośbę klientów wzbogacamy o deklaracje zgodności i inne dokumenty. Systemy wentylacyjne Lindab jako pierwsze na świecie zostały objęte prestiżowym certyfikatem Eurovent potwierdzającym zgodność procesów, maszyn, surowców, przyrządów pomiarowych i produktów ze standardami norm europejskich. 

Wyprzedzamy standardy. Jako pierwsza firma na polskim rynku zaoferowaliśmy bezpłatną 10-letnią gwarancję na wszystkie okrągłe systemy wentylacyjne Lindab. 

Dbamy o środowisko. Bliski dialog z klientami, płaska struktura organizacyjna, doświadczeni eksperci i silna kultura korporacyjna pozwalają nam opracowywać rozwiązania o mniejszym wpływie na środowisko naturalne i oferować klientom najwyższą wartość. 

Wspieramy organizacje branżowe. Jesteśmy zrzeszeni w Stowarzyszeniu Polska Wentylacja, Polskim Zrzeszeniu Inżynierów i Techników Sanitarnych, Ogólnokrajowym Stowarzyszeniu Wspierania Budownictwa Zrównoważonego oraz Europe’s Industry Association for Indoor Climate (HVAC), Process Cooling, and Food Cold Chain Technologies.

Name: Eurobent Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Eurobent is one of the leading producers of Geosynthetic Clay Liners (GCL) in the world. GCL is a liner which incorporates bentonite, an absorbent aluminum phyllosilicate which swells on contact with water. Eurobent has two production plants: one located in Świdnica (South West Poland), and the second, since 2015, in Xanthi (North East Greece). The Greek plant is a Joint Venture project in cooperation with Thrace Plastics.
 
The company offers solutions in the following areas:
- Opencast mining, e.g. Open cast reclamation, tailing lagoon lining, stream diversion etc.
- Construction, e.g. concrete piles and sheet piling, flat roofs, foundation and other subsurface structure,
- Landfills, e.g. Landfill base or landfill capping,
- Water engineering, e.g. water canals, dams, rivers and reservoirs,
- Civil engineering, e.g. roads, bridges and airports.
 
Our goal is continuous development and improvement in the interests of the natural environment and full satisfaction of our customers.

- We use raw materials, materials, fuel, energy and water rationally.
- We work together to reduce the carbon footprint of our products.
- Products are used to build ecological facilities that regulate water and waste management.
- We are looking for new solutions that will allow our clients to act for the sake of the ecosystem.

We offer ecological products!

Onze specialisten zorgen dat elk project voldoet aan de hoogste eisen op het gebied van veiligheid, energie-efficiëntie en gebruikscomfort.

De G.U-groep groeide uit van een familiebedrijf tot een wereldwijde organisatie met vestigingen in Europa, Azië en Noord-Amerika. Met onze elektronische en digitale oplossingen bouwen wij aan duurzame, intelligente en toegankelijke gebouwen. Innovatie en duurzaamheid staan centraal in alles wat wij doen: onze energiezuinige, onderhoudsarme systemen dragen bij aan Smart Building-toepassingen en toekomstbestendig bouwen.

Gretsch-Unitas Nederland – uw betrouwbare partner in beslag- en toegangs¬techniek.
Samen creëren we veilige, toegankelijke en intelligente gebouwen.

Protecting Doors

Protecting People
Primarily focussing on key issues such as entrapment or ligature risk, we offer solutions that focus on prevalent issues such as safety, reduction of ligature possibilities, increased strength and abuse resistance, privacy, access control and compliance with build regulations.

With works carried out in more than 10 countries, ROTOPILE can provide the foundation of structures for housing projects including multi-story houses, road- and railway structures, industrial halls, energy sector, including foundations for transmission power lines, solar panels. We are your smartest option if you are looking to optimize your foundations.


A ROTOPILE é uma empresa de fornecimento de estacas helicoidais, uma solução inovadora de fundações.

Na ROTOPILE conhecemos muito bem essas vantagens, por isso combina o conhecimento técnico que temos sobre a estaca helicoidal com o perfil geotécnico de campo, para oferecer um serviço inteligente único, conseguindo melhorar tempos, otimizar recursos e por fim ter impacto financeiro positivo.

Name: BossCover
Description:
BossCover, het premium merk van Biesmans Group, is een bekende naam in de dakindustrie binnen de Benelux. BossCover is een compleet en kwalitatief gamma van waterdichtingsproducten, met een specialisatie in hoogwaardige EPDM-dakfolie en toebehoren.  Omdat we sterk inzetten op duurzaamheid en innovatie, vervullen we een centrale rol in de ontwikkeling van moderne dakoplossingen.  

Ons uitgebreide assortiment omvat alle EPDM-onderdelen voor de complete bouwschil. BossCover biedt een totaalpakket: van kwalitatieve EPDM-folie tot gespecialiseerde lijmen, tapes en andere essentiële accessoires. Dankzij onze decennialange expertise en een uitgebreid internationaal netwerk kunnen we de beste systeemoplossingen bieden op maat van de projecten van onze klanten.  Op die manier is BossCover een kennispartner voor dakdekkers, architecten, aannemers en bouwhandels. We bieden uitgebreide technische ondersteuning en opleiding, denken proactief mee en zoeken actief naar oplossingen voor projectuitdagingen, waardoor we de hoogste standaarden van kwaliteit en duurzaamheid waarborgen. Want een kwalitatief dakproject vereist kwalitatieve materialen én een kwalitatieve uitvoering! 
  
Het vlaggenschip van duurzame innovatie is het BossCover Circular System. Dit systeem belichaamt onze toewijding aan circulariteit door gebruik te maken van een mechanisch bevestigingssysteem in het dakvlak én in de kim. Zo zorgen we ervoor dat de volledige EPDM-folie kan gedemonteerd en hergebruikt worden. Hiermee bieden we een ecologisch en toekomstgerichte oplossing die de milieu-impact van bouwprojecten aanzienlijk vermindert. Het BossCover Circular System is een tastbaar bewijs van onze inzet voor duurzame oplossingen in de bouwsector.

A conquista da liderança no fornecimento de serviços no segmento de mercado onde nos inserimos.

O resultado dessa estratégia tem vindo a refletir-se no mercado e, paralelamente, tem sido objeto de reconhecimento por parte da Indústria.
Desde o início da nossa atividade obteve um rápido crescimento, o que permitiu desenvolver uma estrutura produtiva bem preparada, e a decorrente consolidação da implantação no mercado nacional com trabalhos de especial relevo na área da arquitetura, engenharia e decoração.
Dispõe atualmente de um corpo técnico permanentes, com a qualificação e experiência adequadas, devidamente apoiados por uma moderna estrutura logística e informática.  

A administração assume uma aposta na formação, na inovação e no desenvolvimento de métodos de organização, orientados para uma evolução e melhoria contínua, que permitam satisfazer as necessidades dos nossos clientes.
A nossa política de parcerias com marcas de referência para o sector onde nos inserimos, permite uma forte solidez e aprofunda o conhecimento de cada um dos mercados criando novas oportunidades de negócio e proporcionando a cada cliente uma amplitude bastante grande relativamente à nossa gama de produtos, tendo a possibilidade de encontrar o produto mais adequado às suas necessidades de forma eficaz.
